授業の概要・背景: This course examines how stories from all over the world, and at different times, all follow a similar structure. We will examine this structure in class and learn how to recreate this structure using specific language for each part. Students will explore the specific types of language used to create interesting stories. This knowledge will be applicable in both casual conversation and also in certain academic settings.

Topics discussed will include an outline of the course, the work that students are expected to undertake, the final project, and what to do when facing problems.

Students will prepare a story to be told in the final class. Each week, more information will be taught that can be used to tell the story according to the format. Students are expected to prepare this final story outside of class time.
